name: Olives & Onions
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Small pitted ripe olives, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the olives and onions in a 1 1/2-quart bowl.
2. In a tightly covered container, mix the remaining ingredients.
3. Pour the mixture over the olives and onions.
4. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours, stirring occasionally.
5. Drain before serving.
6. Serve with wooden picks.
15 servings; 40 calories per serving.
